interactions.stageContent:
{"transcriptText":"Meeting with Meridian Dynamics VP of Sales and CTO on March 12, 2026.

Attendees: Rachel Torres (VP Sales), David Kim (CTO), James Liu (Head of Operations)

Key Discussion Points:
- Current proposal turnaround is 5-7 business days, losing deals to faster competitors
- Need to reduce proposal generation to under 2 hours without sacrificing quality
- Budget approved for Q2 rollout at $180K annual, with potential expansion to $350K for enterprise tier
- Must integrate with existing Google Workspace environment (Slides, Docs, Drive)
- SOC 2 compliance documentation required before procurement can sign off
- Pilot starting April 2026, full rollout target by end of Q2 2026
- Want to improve win rate by 15% through personalized, data-driven proposals
- Need to scale proposal capacity without adding headcount
- CTO wants API access for custom integrations with their CRM
- VP Sales emphasized brand consistency across all generated materials"}
